checks.evidence: Server and public network values must match.
Mainnet build and runtime resolution require a dedicated XRPL_MAINNET_SOURCE_TAG plus explicit gate and Source Tag approvals, with no Testnet fallback.
Exact XRP and RLUSD Mainnet identities are machine-validated and runtime access requires explicit Mainnet gate approval.

Validated-ledger account and trust-line checks fail closed for account existence, destination tags, Deposit Authorization, exact issuer and currency identity, authorization, freeze state, and remaining trust-line capacity.
